## BundleFilenameContext.lazyBundle property

Whether the filename is being resolved for a lazy bundle (async chunk) instead of the main bundle of an entry.

This allows you to control the main bundle and the lazy bundles with a single function, without needing a dedicated `lazyBundle` field.

**Signature:**

```typescript
lazyBundle: boolean;
```
